zh.Towneley, Burnley, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾堂勒
zh.Whalley, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利
zh.Towneley Hall, Burnley, Lancashire, Engl: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利
zh.Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Townley於大約1415年出生在英國藍卡爾波利時，他的父親Richard de Towneley29歲，母親Alice Haworth26歲。他於1445年4月16日與Isabel Sherburne在英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾波利享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Townley于大约1415年出生在英国藍卡爾波利时，他的父亲Richard de Towneley29岁，母亲Alice Haworth26岁。他于1445年4月16日与Isabel Sherburne在英国英格兰藍卡爾華拉利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年在英国英格兰藍卡爾波利享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Townley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Towneley near Burnley in Lancashire, which is named with Middle English toun(e), ton(e) ‘town, village, settlement’ (Old English tūn) + leie ‘glade, clearing’. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Townsley
meanings: English (northern): variant of   Townley  . In Ireland this name was confused with   Tinsley  .

variants.name: Thomley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Townley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Townley was born about 1415, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard de Towneley, was 29 and his mother, Alice Haworth, was 26. He married Isabel Sherburne on 16 April 1445, in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1474, in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Townley est né environ 1415, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Towneley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Haworth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Sherburne le 16 avril 1445, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1474, à Burnley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Townley um 1415 in Burnley, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Towneley 29 und seine Mutter Alice Haworth 26. Er hat am 16. April 1445 in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Sherburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1474 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Burnley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Townley è nato il circa 1415 nel Burnley, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Towneley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Haworth, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Sherburne il 16 aprile 1445, nel Whalley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1474, nel Burnley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Townleyが約1415年にイギリスランカシュアイアブルンリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Towneleyは29歳，母Alice Haworthは26歳であった。1445年4月16日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーでIsabel Sherburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブルンリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Townley(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 랭카실르 번리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Towneley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Haworth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1445년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 화알리에서 Isabel Sherburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 번리에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Townley nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Towneley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Haworth, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Sherburne em 16 de abril de 1445, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1474, em Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Townley родился около 1415 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Towneley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Haworth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Sherburne 16 апреля 1445 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1474 г. в местности бурнли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Townley nació aproximadamente 1415, en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Towneley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Haworth, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabel Sherburne el 16 de abril de 1445, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1474, en Burnley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
